blocks.body: Present Perfect Passive is used to describe actions that have completed but are connected to the present, or when the result of the action is important. Formula: has/have + been + V3.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Present Perfect Passive: has/have + been + V3.", "Вибір: I/You/We/They → have, He/She/It → has.", "been is an invariant part, always before V3.", "Objection: has/have + not + been + V3 (hasn't, haven't).", "Question: Has/Have + Subject + been + V3?", "Used for: completed actions with a result, recent events, experience.", "Маркери часу: just, already, yet, recently, ever, never, this week, since, for.", "Focus on the RESULT, not the process!" ] }
